title: Dmarc
output:
{
  "Domain": "google.com",
  "DMARC Record": "v\u003dDMARC1; p\u003dreject; rua\u003dmailto:mailauth-reports@google.com",
  "Version": "DMARC1",
  "Policy": "reject (block delivery)",
  "Subdomain Policy": "same as domain policy",
  "PCT": "100%",
  "DKIM Alignment": "relaxed",
  "SPF Alignment": "relaxed",
  "Aggregate Reports (rua)": "mailto:mailauth-reports@google.com",
  "Forensic Reports (ruf)": "not configured",
  "Report Format": "afrf",
  "Report Interval": "86400s",
  "Failure Options": "0",
  "TTL": "300s"
}
